sections.paragraph: f., prop. I believe, pitch, the name of which was afterwards transferred to other inflammable materials; specially sulphur. (Syr. ܒܶܒܪܺܝܬܳܐ and ܟܽܒܪܺܝܬܳܐ, Arab. كِبْرِيتُ whence كَبْرَتَ to smear with sulphur, Ch. גָּפְרִיתָא, גּוּפְרִיתָא, כּוּבְרִיתָא id.) Gen 19:24 Deu 29:22 Isa 30:33 34:9 Job 18:15.
